title: MCP Runtime Start/Stop
objective: Start OpenClaw's real MCP stdio bridge against the disposable gateway, perform a JSON-RPC initialize and tools/list smoke, then verify the bridge exits without leaking a runtime process.

phases.title: Gateway Start
phases.intent: Start the gateway and confirm it is healthy before opening the MCP stdio bridge.

phases.title: MCP Bridge Smoke
phases.intent: Spawn the real OpenClaw MCP stdio bridge, initialize it, list tools, and close it cleanly.

phases.title: Post-MCP Gateway Health
phases.intent: Verify the gateway remains responsive after the MCP bridge starts and exits.
